description_long: This stuffed toy depicts a whimsical, cartoonish creature with a large, gaping mouth filled with oversized, dirty teeth. Its skin is a pale pink color, and it has two small, asymmetrical eyes, one of which is perched higher than the other, giving it a quirky appearance. The toy features a single, stubby arm holding a red toothbrush with white bristles, suggesting a humorous dental hygiene theme. Black stitched lines are visible on its head and back, adding to its handmade, plush-like aesthetic. The back of the toy is rounded and smooth, with no additional features except for the stitching. The overall design is playful and slightly grotesque, making it a unique and eye-catching urban toy.
description: A quirky, pale pink stuffed toy with a large mouth of dirty teeth, asymmetrical eyes, and a red toothbrush in one hand. Black stitching details and a rounded, plush body complete its playful, slightly grotesque look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide open mouth with large, dirty teeth, both eyes, and the red toothbrush held in the right hand.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the protruding toothbrush and the depth of the mouth, with one arm and the rounded body visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, rounded back with visible black stitching and no facial features or accessories.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the mouth's profile, one eye, and the toothbrush extending forward.
attribute_character_or_animal_represente: cartoonish creature with large teeth and a toothbrush
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is wide-mouthed and exaggerated, with large, uneven teeth exposed and asymmetrical, bulging eyes giving a surprised or startled look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: The toy is upright with one arm extended forward holding a toothbrush, while the other arm is relaxed at its side. Its mouth is wide open, and its body is rounded and slightly hunched.
